original_image_tags: Yellowed, aged document page, likely the back of a carbon copy or routing sheet. Features multiple date stamps from April 1960, red classification markings, and faint typed text visible from the reverse side. Two hole-punch marks at the top. Red handwritten initials "E.W." at top center.

elements.description: A page containing faint, reversed bleed-through text from the opposite side, two dark circular hole-punches at the top, a handwritten red annotation reading 'EW 3', and multiple stamped labels including 'RECEIVED-DIRECTOR FBI APR 7 9 47 AM '60', 'RECEIVED J. E. HOOVER FBI', 'RECEIVED TOLSON FBI APR 6 6 42 PM '60', 'RECEIVED - MOHRA FBI APR 6 5 42 PM '60', 'REC'D 9 13 AM 6', 'RECD 10 45 AM 60 APR 6', '21 FEB 12 1962', and a vertical stamp on the right margin that appears to read 'COPY TO INTERAGENCY UFO COMMITTEE'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual elements: yellowed page, bleed-through text, two hole-punches, red handwritten initials (EW vs EW 3 is minor wording difference), and multiple date stamps from 1960, with no contradictory claims on specific quoted text.
